title: Kuro’s Plan Against Kaya Is Revealed
description: On pages 4–6, the Syrup Village story develops through Usopp, Kaya, Kuro, Jango, and the Straw Hats as the danger behind the village’s peaceful surface becomes clearer.
scene: This scene follows the tension around Usopp’s village: lies, loyalty, hidden plans, and the growing clash with the Black Cat Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: They're going to attack from this shore

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Because, this is the only way into the village

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: This means, as long as we guard this slope with our lives, the village won't be harmed!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: What are you guys good at?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I cannot believe all this happened when I was away...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: That USOPPP kid is quite a trouble maker

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Yes, I know. I can't believe that he would even claim that you are a pirate...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: It's not even a good lie...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: only an idiot would believe a thing he says...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: That's a present from Ojou- SAMA

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: She said it's because tomorrow will be exactly three years since you first came to work at this mansion

dialogue.speaker: Merry
dialogue.text: So Ojousama went to the next town personally and ordered this special pair of glasses!

summary: The part advances the Syrup Village arc by tying Usopp’s reputation and Kaya’s safety to the threat posed by Kuro and his crew.
